title: Epic Test Strategy
description: Per-epic test strategy stored in a standalone file (epics/epic-N/tests/test-strategy.json). Defines scope, approach, tooling, and coverage targets for testing an individual epic. Distinct from the global test-summary artifact.

metadata.description: Standard BMAD artifact metadata. artifactType MUST be 'epic-test-strategy'. Must include epicId.

title.description: Human-readable title for this test strategy

epicId.description: Epic ID this test strategy covers, using numeric format (e.g. '1', '15')

scope.description: What is in and out of scope for testing

testTypes.description: Types of testing to be performed (unit, integration, e2e, etc.)

tooling.description: Testing tools and frameworks to use

riskAreas.description: High-risk areas requiring additional test attention
